sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 팔란티어는 3분기 매출 11억 8,100만 달러를 기록하며 미국 상업 부문 매출이 121% 성장하는 등 강력한 실적을 달성했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 미국 상업 부문 매출이 전년 동기 대비 121% 급증하며 전체 매출 성장을 견인했습니다.
전체 매출은 전년 동기 대비 63% 증가한 11억 8,100만 달러를 기록했으며, 2025년 연간 매출 가이던스를 상향 조정했습니다.

businessChanges.text: 총 계약 가치(TCV)가 전년 동기 대비 151% 증가한 27억 6,000만 달러를 기록하며 역대 최고치를 경신했습니다.
100만 달러 이상의 계약 204건, 500만 달러 이상 91건, 1,000만 달러 이상 53건을 체결하며 대형 계약 수주가 활발했습니다.

financialHighlights.text: GAAP 기준 영업이익은 3억 9,300만 달러(영업이익률 33%), 조정 영업이익은 6억 100만 달러(영업이익률 51%)를 기록했습니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 a2025q3ex991earningsrelease.htm EX-99.1 Document Exhibit 99.1 Palantir Reports Q3 2025 U.S. Comm Revenue Growth of 121% Y/Y and Revenue Growth of 63% Y/Y; Guides Q4 Revenue to 61% Y/Y and U.S. Comm Revenue to 121% Y/Y; Raises FY 2025 Revenue Guidance to 53% Y/Y, Crushing Consensus Expectations 11/3/2025 DENVER — (BUSINESS WIRE) — Palantir Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ:PLTR) today announced financial results for the third quarter ended September 30, 2025. “114% - our Rule of 40 score! These results make undeniable the transformational impact of using AIP to compound AI leverage. Year-over-year growth in our U.S. business surged to 77%, and year-over-year growth in U.S. commercial climbed to 121%. We are yet again announcing the highest sequential quarterly revenue growth guide in our company’s history, representing 61% year-over-year growth,” said Alex C. Karp, Co-Founder and Chief

Executive Officer of Palantir Technologies. Q3 2025 Highlights • U.S. revenue grew 77% year-over-year and 20% quarter-over-quarter to $883 million ◦ U.S. commercial revenue grew 121% year-over-year and 29% quarter-over-quarter to $397 million ◦ U.S. government revenue grew 52% year-over-year and 14% quarter-over-quarter to $486 million • Revenue grew 63% year-over-year and 18% quarter-over-quarter to $1.181 billion • Closed 204 deals of at least $1 million, 91 deals of at least $5 million, and 53 deals of at least $10 million • Closed a record-setting $2.76 billion of total contract value (“TCV”), up 151% year-over-year ◦ Closed a re  Normalized numeric aliases: $883 million = 8억 8,300만 달러; $397 million = 3억 9,700만 달러; $486 million = 4억 8,600만 달러; $1.181 billion = 11억 8,100만 달러; $1 million = 100만 달러; $5 million = 500만 달러; $10 million = 1,000만 달러; $2.76 billion = 27억 6,000만 달러; $3.63 billion = 36억 3,000만 달러; $1 = 1달러; $3.63 = 3.63달러; $5 = 5달러; $10 = 10달러; $2.76 = 2.76달러; $1.31 = 1.31달러.

• GAAP income from operations of $393 million, representing a 33% margin • Adjusted income from operations of $601 million, representing a 51% margin • Rule of 40 score of 114% • GAAP net income of $476 million, representing a 40% margin • Cash from operations of $508 million, representing a 43% margin • Adjusted free cash flow of $540 million, representing a 46% margin • GAAP earnings per share (“EPS”) of $0.18 • Adjusted EPS of $0.21 • Cash, cash equivalents, and short-term U.S. Treasury securities of $6.4 billion Q3 2025 Financial Summary (Unaudited) (Amounts in thousands, except p  Normalized numeric aliases: $393 million = 3억 9,300만 달러; $601 million = 6억 100만 달러; $476 million = 4억 7,600만 달러; $508 million = 5억 800만 달러; $540 million = 5억 4,000만 달러; $6.4 billion = 64억 달러; $393 = 393달러; $601 = 601달러; $508 = 508달러; 393,256 million = 3,932억 5,600만 달러; $0.21 = 0.21달러; $6.4 = 6.4달러; 600,540 million = 6,005억 4,000만 달러; 507,664 million = 5,076억 6,400만 달러; 539,862 million = 5,398억 6,200만 달러.

n Stockholders $ 475,599 40 % Adjusted Net Income Attributable to Common Stockholders $ 528,709 Adjusted EBITDA $ 606,515 51 % GAAP EPS, Diluted $ 0.18 Adjusted EPS, Diluted $ 0.21 Outlook For Q4 2025, we expect: • Revenue of between $1.327 - $1.331 billion. • Adjusted income from operations of between $695 - $699 million. For full year 2025: • We are raising our revenue guidance to between $4.396 - $4.400 billion. • We are raising our U.S. commercial revenue guidance to in excess of $1.433 billion, representing a growth rate of at least 104%. • We are raising our adjuste  Normalized numeric aliases: $1.331 billion = 13억 3,100만 달러; $699 million = 6억 9,900만 달러; $4.400 billion = 44억 달러; $1.433 billion = 14억 3,300만 달러; $2.155 billion = 21억 5,500만 달러; $2.1 billion = 21억 달러; $0.18 = 0.18달러; $0.21 = 0.21달러; $1.331 = 1.331달러; $1.433 = 1.433달러; 475,599 million = 4,755억 9,900만 달러; $2.155 = 2.155달러; $1.9 = 1.9달러; $2.1 = 2.1달러; 528,709 million = 5,287억 900만 달러; 606,515 million = 6,065억 1,500만 달러.
